steps.title: Identify the subject and its number
steps.content: The subject of the blank is “researchers like Aliya Bhatia of the Center for Democracy and Technology.” The head noun is researchers (plural); the appositive modifier that follows does not change the subject's grammatical number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A plural subject requires a plural verb form in the present tense. Choice C, fear, is the only plural verb and satisfies subject-verb agreement. Choices A, B, and D are all singular forms that violate the rule. That matches choice C — C is correct.
